milestones.scope: First source-only Android/Windows snapshot with local community import, QR import foundation, and gated Free VPN catalog metadata.
Community import hub polish, variant-boundary enforcement, and source-import hardening.
Operator fixture, Free VPN catalog gate, white-label token export, and foreground subscription scheduler.
Native Android/Windows host brand-boundary hardening.
Community routing and WARP copy honesty hardening.
Dependency/license and generated-asset provenance inventory gates.
Source-release proof helper for archive SHA-256 and source-only manifest generation.
Source readiness matrix for tracked source-only milestones, gates, and limitations.
Public onboarding and triage hardening for community users, operators, PRs, and issue templates.
Operator API contract hardening with request IDs, versioning, standard errors, retry headers, and fixture smoke coverage.
Gated Free VPN catalog cache actions: manual opt-in import, local third-party catalog profiles, refresh metadata, and clear scope.
Source-readiness synchronization for stacked source-only milestones through the Free VPN catalog cache action slice.
Manual Free VPN catalog import gated behind OPEN_CLIENT_ENABLE_FREE_CATALOG with default-disabled public builds.
Source-readiness synchronization through the default-disabled Free VPN catalog feature flag slice.
Operator support ticket path canonicalization across docs, OpenAPI, fixtures, smoke tests, and app adapter contracts.
Community local-access wording and model guards so Open Client local profiles are not presented as free POKROV service nodes.
Seed-backed variant command preview tooling for Android and Windows community, operator, and official POKROV build modes.
Proof-manifest-backed source release notes renderer that preserves source-only honesty flags before GitHub Release publication.
Annotated source tag enforcement for proof-manifest generation so lightweight tags cannot be used for source release publication.
End-to-end source release smoke proving the generated proof manifest can render source-only GitHub Release notes without local path leakage.
Self-documenting rendered source release notes: generated verification blocks include the renderer command with a public manifest label.
One-command source-release preflight that runs release gates, creates proof artifacts, renders notes, and writes a local summary without publishing binaries.
CI source-release preflight smoke coverage so pull requests exercise proof generation, release-note rendering, and summary output together.
Specialized GitHub triage templates for profile import problems, operator integration questions, and public security-report redirection.
Canonical GitHub label catalog and triage policy for community, operator, platform, parser, runtime, release, and security-private routing.
Runtime artifact manifest gate for local-only libcore downloads, pending binary review metadata, SHA-256 verification hooks, and safe sync destinations.
Source release copy-claims gate for policy, checklist, template, renderer, and rendered GitHub Release drafts.
Free VPN catalog provenance gate for reviewed feed hosts, attribution, license evidence, no-network CI, and required release-note boundaries.
Seed-backed private security intake gate for public issue redirection, secret redaction, QR/subscription URL boundaries, and source-only release claim safety.
Seed-backed changelog and release-history gate that keeps source readiness milestones synchronized with evidence-honest public release notes.
Contributor doctor and docs index gate for read-only toolchain diagnostics, local bootstrap template coverage, build issue reporting, and source-only onboarding.
Build troubleshooting router for source checkout, toolchain, Android, Windows, runtime-artifact, clean-clone, and redacted issue-report paths.
CODEOWNERS and review-routing gate for maintainer-led source-only ownership across security, release, Android, Windows, runtime, operator, docs, CI, and source-boundary paths.
Dependabot and dependency update policy gate for GitHub Actions and Dart/Flutter pub workspaces with bounded PRs, labels, human review, license inventory, and source-only release boundaries.
Required checks and branch-protection policy gate for CI job names, source-release gates, read-only workflow permissions, and no-claim release boundaries.
GitHub ruleset setup gate for repository ruleset or branch protection configuration, manual verification, and no-claim release boundaries.
Read-only GitHub ruleset verifier for maintainers to audit remote rulesets or branch protection before claiming enforcement.
Release evidence bundle helper that collects source preflight output, proof paths, source-only flags, and optional GitHub ruleset status.
Source release publication dry-run validator for checking the release evidence bundle and rendered release notes before manual GitHub Release publication.
Enterprise boundary and operator commercial-license guard for GPLv3, paid service, dual-license, and fork distribution claims.
Safe support diagnostics copy/export for redacted JSON without keys, subscription URLs, raw configs, or proxy links.
Privacy-first diagnostics export policy gate for local-only, user-initiated, redacted support diagnostics and future log-export surfaces.
Release blocker inventory for source tag readiness, manual maintainer steps, and no-binary release boundaries.
Source tag readiness command that reads blocker and readiness seeds, writes a local summary, and returns non-zero while required blockers remain.
Release merge-order verifier that checks the local stacked PR manifest before manual merge or tag work.
Release stack GitHub status verifier that checks a read-only PR status snapshot before manual merge or tag work.
Release merge handoff helper that bundles local merge-order, GitHub-status, and tag-readiness summaries for maintainer review.
Android device validation checklist and local smoke precheck plus documented release merge handoff default-path regression fix.
Operator API request header compliance for per-request trace IDs and client version compatibility metadata.
Android native Gradle unit tests in CI through a source-only libcore stub lane plus required-check synchronization.
Windows bundle verifier for source-only Windows shell proof, committed artifact checks, and release-boundary documentation.
Runtime archive extraction hardening for local libcore fetches, including traversal checks before extraction or host sync.
Windows bundle verifier enforcement in CI and source-release preflight summaries for source-only release proof.
Release evidence bundle gate requiring Windows bundle verifier proof from source-release preflight summaries.
Publication dry-run gate requiring Windows bundle verifier proof in release evidence before manual GitHub Release review.
Release merge handoff gate requiring publication dry-run proof, including Windows bundle verifier proof and no-publish summary fields.
Release merge handoff input fingerprints for merge-order, GitHub-status, tag-readiness, and publication dry-run summaries.
Release merge handoff source-only summary flags for no APK, EXE, store release, or trusted signing claim.
Release merge handoff canonical build input roots for merge-order, GitHub-status, tag-readiness, and publication dry-run summaries.
Release merge handoff input generated-at checks and summary timestamps for merge-order, GitHub-status, tag-readiness, and publication dry-run evidence.
Release merge handoff input schema and read-only checks for merge-order, GitHub-status, tag-readiness, and publication dry-run evidence.
Release merge handoff stack-count consistency checks for merge-order and GitHub-status evidence.
Release merge handoff error-free input summary checks for merge-order, GitHub-status, and publication dry-run evidence.
Release merge handoff tag-readiness input error coverage for error-free prerequisite evidence.
Release merge handoff tag-readiness open blocker count consistency checks.
Release merge handoff tag-readiness open blocker entry shape checks.
Release merge handoff tag-readiness ready/tag-allowed flag consistency checks.
Release merge handoff tag-readiness blocker-absence consistency checks.
Source tag readiness and release merge handoff open-blocker evidence field checks.
Release merge handoff tag-readiness latest stacked PR consistency checks.
Release merge handoff seed default paths track the latest source candidate.
Release merge handoff runtime checks match blocker inventory latest candidate and PR.
Source tag readiness blocks requested tags that do not match the blocker inventory latest candidate.
Source tag readiness blocks source-readiness milestone evidence that points at a different stacked PR.
Source tag readiness blocks source-readiness milestone release flags that are not source-only.
Source tag readiness blocks release blocker inventory flags that are not source-only.
Source tag readiness blocks open release blockers that are missing evidence.
Source tag readiness blocks open release blockers that are missing stable identifiers.
Source tag readiness blocks open release blockers that are missing status.
Source tag readiness blocks release blockers that are missing required_before_tag=true.
Source tag readiness blocks the selected source-readiness milestone when status is missing.
Source tag readiness blocks the selected source-readiness milestone when evidence is missing.
Source tag readiness blocks the selected source-readiness milestone when scope is missing.
Source tag readiness writes a read-only summary that release merge handoff can consume directly.
Source tag readiness records input fingerprints for blocker inventory and source-readiness seeds.
Release merge handoff carries and validates tag-readiness input fingerprints from source evidence.
Publication dry-run and release merge handoff carry input fingerprints for evidence bundle and release notes.
Release evidence bundle records input fingerprints for source preflight summary proof.
Source preflight records artifact fingerprints and release evidence carries them through publication and handoff proof.
Release evidence, publication dry-run, and merge handoff validate artifact fingerprint integrity against real files and carried release proof.
Release evidence, publication dry-run, and merge handoff validate commit SHA consistency from source preflight through maintainer handoff.
Source preflight records resolved ref commit SHA, and release evidence, publication dry-run, and merge handoff validate ref commit consistency through maintainer handoff.
Release stack GitHub status records pull request URLs, and release merge handoff carries the latest PR URL for maintainer review.
Release stack GitHub status and release merge handoff verify latest PR URLs stay inside the expected public repository boundary.
Release merge handoff validates that GitHub status expected PR URL prefixes match the configured public repository boundary.
Release merge handoff validates GitHub status summary counts against the merge stack and required status checks.
Release merge handoff validates GitHub status pull request entries before maintainer review.
Release merge handoff validates GitHub status pull request sequence against the merge-order stack before maintainer review.
Release merge handoff validates GitHub status pull request base and head refs against the merge-order stack before maintainer review.
Release merge handoff validates every GitHub status pull request URL against the expected repository prefix and merge-order PR number before maintainer review.
Release merge handoff validates every GitHub status pull request state is CLEAN and not draft before maintainer review.
Release stack GitHub status records per-PR required check evidence, and release merge handoff validates every GitHub status PR check before maintainer review.
Release stack GitHub status records per-check GitHub Actions trace evidence, and release merge handoff validates every GitHub status PR check trace before maintainer review.
Publication dry-run validates the release evidence bundle preflight input fingerprint against the real preflight summary before manual release review.
Release merge handoff validates publication dry-run preflight input fingerprints against the real preflight summary before maintainer handoff.
Release merge handoff validates publication dry-run direct input fingerprints against the real evidence bundle and release notes before maintainer handoff.
Release merge handoff validates tag readiness direct input fingerprints against the real blocker inventory and source readiness seeds before maintainer handoff.
Release merge handoff validates publication dry-run artifact fingerprints against real proof manifest, source archive, release notes, and Windows verifier files before maintainer handoff.
Release evidence, publication dry-run, and release merge handoff carry and verify optional GitHub ruleset report input fingerprints before enforcement claims can reach maintainer review.
Release evidence refuses malformed GitHub ruleset reports before enforcement claims can be carried into publication dry-run or release merge handoff.
Publication dry-run refuses malformed GitHub ruleset reports from release evidence before enforcement claims can reach manual release review or release merge handoff.
Release merge handoff refuses malformed GitHub ruleset reports carried by publication dry-run before maintainer handoff can be marked ready.
Release evidence, publication dry-run, and release merge handoff reject GitHub ruleset reports for the wrong repository or branch before enforcement claims can be carried forward.
Release evidence, publication dry-run, and release merge handoff reject GitHub ruleset reports that claim ok without verifier checks or while carrying failed checks.
Release evidence, publication dry-run, and release merge handoff reject GitHub ruleset reports whose verifier check entries are missing traceable name or status fields.
Release evidence, publication dry-run, and release merge handoff reject GitHub ruleset reports whose required status checks do not match the canonical required-checks seed.
Release evidence, publication dry-run, and release merge handoff reject GitHub ruleset reports whose passing verifier checks do not cover every canonical required CI job.

GitHub ruleset verifier reports covered required status checks explicitly, and release evidence, publication dry-run, and release merge handoff reject ok reports whose covered required checks do not match the canonical CI job list.
Release evidence, publication dry-run, and release merge handoff reject GitHub ruleset reports without a fresh checked_at timestamp before carrying enforcement claims.
Release merge handoff rejects missing, invalid, stale, or too-far-future generated_at timestamps on merge order, GitHub status, tag readiness, and publication dry-run input summaries.
Release evidence rejects stale preflight summaries and publication dry-run rejects stale evidence bundles before those artifacts can feed maintainer handoff.
Source tag readiness rejects contradictory blocker inventory states where tag creation is allowed while required blockers remain open or inventory status is not ready.
Source tag readiness rejects blocker inventory states that claim ready status while required release blockers remain open.
Source tag readiness rejects tag creation allowance while the selected source-readiness milestone is still pending or not tagged.
Source tag readiness uses an explicit ready-status allowlist for the selected source-readiness milestone before allowing tag creation.
Source tag readiness requires milestone evidence to match the canonical Kiwunaka/Pokrov-client PR URL before tag readiness can pass.
Seed validation requires source tag-readiness evidence policy flags and canonical PR URL guard phrases to remain enforced.
Seed validation requires the source-readiness latest candidate and evidence URL to match the blocker inventory latest source-only PR.
Seed validation requires the release merge-order latest candidate and PR to match the blocker inventory top source-only PR.
Seed validation requires the release blocker inventory covered range to match its base and latest source-only candidates.
Seed validation requires source-readiness milestone tags to be unique so release evidence cannot fork by duplicate tag.
Seed validation requires every stacked PR source-readiness milestone evidence URL to stay inside the canonical public repository PR boundary.
Seed validation requires stacked PR source-readiness milestone evidence URLs to be unique so two release candidates cannot claim the same PR proof.
Seed validation requires stacked PR source-readiness milestone evidence PR numbers to increase with the release candidate sequence.
Seed validation requires source-readiness stacked PR milestone evidence to match the release merge-order stack for every tracked candidate.
Seed validation requires release stack GitHub status required checks to exactly match the canonical required-checks seed.
Seed validation requires active-range source-readiness stacked PR milestones to be covered by the release merge-order stack.
Source publication packet consolidates release handoff, publication dry-run, source proof artifacts, and source-only flags for manual GitHub Release review.
Source publication packet validates release handoff and publication dry-run generated_at timestamps before manual GitHub Release review.
Source publication packet validates handoff-carried publication dry-run fingerprints against the direct dry-run summary before manual release review.
Source publication packet recalculates release artifact file fingerprints before manual GitHub Release review.
Source publication packet rejects release artifact paths outside the expected build output roots before manual GitHub Release review.
Source publication packet rejects unexpected non-source release asset fingerprints before manual GitHub Release review.
Source publication packet rejects release artifact files whose extensions do not match the source-only artifact contract.
Source publication packet validates source release artifact contents before manual GitHub Release review.
Source publication packet validates source release artifact JSON schemas before manual GitHub Release review.
Source publication packet validates release notes claim and known-limitation markers before manual GitHub Release review.
Source publication packet validates release notes tag and source archive SHA proof before manual GitHub Release review.
Source publication packet validates proof manifest source archive SHA binding before manual GitHub Release review.
Source publication packet validates proof manifest source archive filename binding before manual GitHub Release review.
Source publication packet validates proof manifest commit SHA binding before manual GitHub Release review.
Source publication packet validates proof manifest tag binding before manual GitHub Release review.
